title: Viking Therapeutics (VKTX) Q2 2021 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Q2 2021 earnings call transcript for VKTX. Viking Therapeutics was set to release its second-quarter earnings on July 23rd. Analysts projected an earnings per share of -$0.44, while no revenue was expected for the quarter. Over the previous three months, EPS estimates had experienced 11 downgrades and no upgrades. The consensus from 19 brokerage firms rated Viking Therapeutics at an average of 1.7 on a scale where 1 signifies a Strong Buy and 5 denotes a Sell, reflecting an Outperform rating. The consensus average target price stood at $89.81, suggesting a potential upside of 182.92%. During the quarter, Viking continued enrollment of patients into their Phase 2b VOYAGE study evaluating VK2809 in the setting of NASH and fibrosis.
